Event: Tabletop Hustle
Event Date: 01/06/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A238


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Toothy Trap

Triggers: Once in a while

Iron Grip
The artifact owner gains the vampiric power for 5 sec and bites 2 random enemies. The effect of the bite lasts for 5 sec. Bitten units become entangled. They take 100000 magic damage every second while the bite is active, can't move, and their weapons and artifacts are silenced. The effect of the bite can't be removed. If an enemy dies while the bite is active, the enemy cannot be resurrected during the duration of the vampiric power, and the artifact owner bites another random enemy who does not yet have the bite effect. All the effects of the bite continue working on the new target. When the vampiric power wears off or the artifact owner dies, the bites are removed from all enemies.

Requirements: 90-100
